message:
feat(fcp-host): add operation receipt tracking with persistence and query API

Implement end-to-end receipt tracking for connector operation invocations,
enabling audit trails and post-hoc analysis of every operation the host
processes.

Core changes:

fcp-core/operation.rs:
  Add length-prefixed serialization for idempotency keys and upstream
  idempotency fields in OperationIntent::digest_bytes() and
  OperationReceipt::digest_bytes(). Length-prefixed strings prevent
  boundary-condition parsing errors when keys contain delimiter-like
  characters. Fix test to use IntentStatus::Pending instead of
  InProgress for initial state.

fcp-host/admin_state.rs (+219 lines):
  Add receipts: Vec<ReceiptSummary> field to HostAdminStateSnapshot.
  Implement record_receipt() to persist receipt summaries after each
  invoke, and query_receipts() to filter stored receipts by connector,
  operation name, time range, and success/failure status. Includes
  test_receipt_summary() helper and comprehensive record_and_query test.

fcp-host/bin/fcp-host.rs (+105 lines):
  Wire receipt tracking into the invoke flow: capture operation name
  and idempotency key in invoke_handler() and execute_batch_operation(),
  then call new record_invoke_receipt_summary() helper to persist the
  receipt asynchronously. Add /rpc/admin/receipts POST endpoint with
  receipt_query_handler() that accepts ReceiptQueryRequest and returns
  ReceiptQueryResponse.

Integration test:
  Extend host_connector_integration.rs to set idempotency keys on
  invoke requests and validate the /rpc/admin/receipts query endpoint
  returns correct receipt_id, operation, success flag, and
  idempotency_key in responses.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
